headline: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong FFO Growth and ...
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) reports a 10.6% increase in FFO per share and raises guidance amid robust leasing and capital recycling efforts.
